title: Keltos IV

'''Keltos IV''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] astronomical object situated in the [[Irnaj sector/Legends|Irnaj sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was the site of a [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Additionally, [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Sector Plexus/Legends|Sector Plexus]] facilities were located in the celestial body's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Espionage droid|spy droid]] [[R2-C3]] worked undercover on [[Computer/Legends|computer]] network security there, surreptitiously transmitting to the Alliance information he had recorded from the facilities' computers.

==Description==
Keltos IV,<ref name="CRO" /> also known simply as Keltos,<ref name="SoR" /> was a celestial body<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Keltos system/Legends|Keltos system]], a part of the [[Irnaj sector/Legends|Irnaj sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA Keltos" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on the [[D'Aelgoth Trade Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the [[Miztoc system/Legends|Miztoc system]] as well as<ref name="Route" /> the [[Feenix system/Legends|Feenix system]] of the [[D'Aelgoth sector/Legends|D'Aelgoth sector]] and the [[Wornal sector/Legends|Wornal sector's]] [[Kriselist system/Legends|Kriselist system]].<ref name="Mid Rim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-sectors-of-the-mid-rim|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Sectors of the Mid Rim}}</ref>

==History==
[[File:R2-C3_CRO.png|thumb|right|250px|R2-C3 was an undercover Rebel Alliance spy who worked on computer network security aboard Imperial Intelligence Sector Plexus facilities in orbit over Keltos IV.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] [[Sector Plexus/Legends|Sector Plexus]] facilities above Keltos IV. The [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Espionage droid|spy]] [[R2-C3]] worked undercover on [[Computer/Legends|computer]] network security there. He recorded information from the facilities' computers and transmitted it to the Alliance using unused portions of the Sector Plexus's broadcast frequencies. The signals were then extracted from the transmissions by several Rebel agents who were servicing relay [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]] stations. Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] eventually noted R2-C3's service over Keltos IV in an entry dedicated to the [[Astromech droid/Legends|droid]] that was part of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

Around that time, Keltos IV also hosted one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] major [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Starshipwright|manufacturers]], which imported from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="SoR" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] and the astronomical object [[Medth]]<ref name="SoR" /> of the Mid Rim's [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]]<ref name="EAOC Medth">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Medth system/Legends|Medth system]]</ref> high-technology products manufactured on the [[Factory world/Legends|industrial planet]] [[Ord Gimmel/Legends|Ord Gimmel]].<ref name="SoR" /> Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Keltos IV was the site of a Class II [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial military]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]]. The output of the facility was limited to [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Locations==
During the Galactic Civil War, Keltos IV's orbit was the site of Imperial Intelligence Sector Plexus facilities.<ref name="CRO" /> An Imperial military shipyard was also located at the celestial body.<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Keltos IV was created by [[David R. Tulo, Jr.]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Keltos [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Keltos IV, in grid square K-17.<ref name="TEA Keltos" /> ''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]'', a [[2015]] sourcebook published for use with [[Fantasy Flight Games]]' [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion (roleplaying game)|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'']] line of [[Star Wars Roleplaying|roleplaying]] products, later introduced the shortened name "Keltos" for the celestial body.<ref name="SoR" />
